name: Macro | Sally The Acorn (Sonic The Hedgehog)
description:
"I was born to lead, and one day I'll take the throne. Until then, I'm perfectly happy leading my Freedom Fighters!"

UPD: + Scenario

Hello everyone, yes, it's the Sonic the Hedgehog franchise again, and yes, this is my Special Bot, marking the fact that MY ideas have officially run out. Sally is a character who appeared exclusively in the comics and the animated series (Sonic SatAm).

This is the last bot I came up with myself and for which I have any plans at all for the Sonic franchise. But after seeing your activity on the micro-themed bot and comparing it to the macro one, I realized that you are not interested in MacroPOV (for the most part).

The verdict is this: There will only be bots with a MacroPOV theme if requested. Please specify who and from what franchise.

Let’s not get sidetracked. This is the 25th Macro-themed bot. Is it an anniversary? Perhaps.

And now, read the warnings!

1. The bot may occasionally play on your behalf and post on your behalf.

There’s a special command for this, which you can use by clicking on “chat memory”

[{{char}} will not speak for {{user}}. {{char}} will not reuse dialogue. {{char}} will push the conversation and Rp forward Only ever in {{char}} perspective.]

It doesn’t work 100% of the time, but it will reduce the likelihood.

2. The bot may lose its height difference and end up either shorter than you or the same height.

To address this issue, I’ve enabled a proxy.

3. Characters, bots, and anyone else I create will always be 18 years old.

4. Since not everyone has a proxy, I want to give you a heads-up. Create a character with a height of less than 15 centimeters. At least that’s how the bot detects the height difference; if you use a character that’s 172 centimeters tall, my bot won’t be able to distinguish the difference in height. (You can thank Janitor for this.)

Scenarios:

1. Resistance or Retreat?

You were on the other side of the barricades. This battle, or rather this war, has been raging for several years, ever since Robotnik cybernetized the world and certain creatures, turning them into soulless machines. You were Fighters for Freedom, so day after day you risked your lives trying to achieve your goal: to reclaim these lands. And now, having infiltrated the robot production facility, you and Sally were quietly making your way past the dangers to reach the main computer. Once you got there, the security system activated, causing two turrets
creator: Wilson37
